mapper.select: SELECT id, name, vendor, model_id, api_key, base_url, status, config, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM model_config WHERE vendor = #{vendor} AND model_id = #{modelId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, vendor, model_id, api_key, base_url, status, config, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM model_config WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM model_config WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
